auth.failed: The email or password is invalid.
auth.locked: Your account is temporarily locked after too many failed attempts.
auth.throttle: Too many login attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.register_throttle: Too many registration attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.register_failed: Account registration failed. Please review your input.
auth.register_success: Account created successfully and you are now signed in.
auth.login_success: Signed in to Quenza CMS successfully.
auth.login_required: Please sign in first to access the dashboard.

validation.email_taken: The email address is already registered.
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.

language.heading: Choose the installation language
language.description: Select the primary language to use during the initial Quenza CMS setup.

database.title: Database Setup
database.heading: Connect Quenza CMS to your database
database.description: SQLite is the default installation mode, but you can also use MySQL if you already have a database server ready.
database.required: Database configuration must be completed before continuing the installation.

site.title: Site Information & Admin
site.heading: Complete your site and admin information
site.description: These values will be used to create the initial configuration, administrator account, and starter content.
site.password_help: Use a strong password with at least 10 characters including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
site.failed: Site or admin information is not valid yet.

success.title: Installation Successful
success.heading: Installation Successful!
success.description: Quenza CMS has been installed and seeded with starter content for the site
